title: MDI Dispatch
description: The envelope the job orchestrator sends to a worker's queue to ask it to perform one task (one workflow step). This schema is the language-neutral source of truth for the MDI message contract; the canonical Go binding lives in github.com/nyudlts/go-mdi (package mdi).

version.description: The envelope schema version (semver). The current contract version is 1.0.0.

request_id.description: A deterministic idempotency key. The orchestrator sets it to the task id, so a broker redelivery or an orchestrator re-dispatch of the same task carries the same key.

job_id.description: The id of the job this task belongs to.

task_id.description: The id of the task to perform.

step_id.description: The workflow step id this task realizes.

params.description: Service-specific key/value pairs the worker needs to perform the task.

reply_to.description: The address where the worker must publish its Result. The orchestrator owns routing, so the worker echoes results here without knowing the broker topology.
